description_long: This object features a bell-shaped, blue-green pot with a frosted white top and a speckled gradient transitioning to a deeper teal at the base. Emerging from the pot are three broad, purple leaves with visible vein patterns, each leaf splaying outward and downward. A long, slender, purple stem or tendril curls upward from the top center of the pot, adding a whimsical, organic touch. The pot itself is smooth and unadorned, with no visible seams or handles, and the leaves have a slightly matte, textured appearance. The overall design is stylized and modern, with a focus on bold color contrasts and simple, clean lines. There are no visible plant labels or decorative motifs on the pot.
description: A stylized potted plant with a blue-green bell-shaped pot, three broad purple leaves, and a curling purple stem.
description_view_0: The pot is seen from a slightly angled front, showing two side leaves and the central leaf with the curling stem arching to the left.
description_view_1: A direct front view, with the central purple leaf and stem most prominent, and both side leaves symmetrically visible.
description_view_2: The pot is viewed from a slightly rightward angle, with the central leaf and curling stem arching to the right.
description_view_3: A rear view, showing the back of the pot and leaves, with the stem curling away from the viewer.
attribute_plant_species: fantasy or stylized plant (not a real species)
